title: penstemon janishiae
intro: Penstemon janishiae, also known as Janish's beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Penstemon janishiae are said to include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds.
